narrative:
Paris township has 3,537 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.6 percentage points.
